about.title: Rooted in Yaad. Built for Today.
paragraphs: Spanish Town Caribbean Foods brings authentic Jamaican flavors into convenient, ready-to-enjoy packaged goods for wholesale buyers and retail partners.
Inspired by generations of traditional recipes and deep roots in Spanish Town, Jamaica, the brand delivers bold, genuine flavor with a clean, commercial presentation designed for modern distribution.

print.note: Address: 5712 SW 25TH STREET, WEST PARK, FL 33023 | Phone: Tel:(954)-864-9057 | Email: spaintownimports@gmail.com

products.name: Banana Bread
products.description:
Moist, rich, and naturally sweet.Made with ripe bananas for that soft texture and full flavor. Feels like something you grab in the morning without thinking twice

Nutrition Facts: Serving Size 85g. Calories 350. Total Fat 33g (41%), Saturated Fat 7g (33%), Trans Fat 1g. Cholesterol 50mg (31%). Sodium 280mg (12%). Total Carbohydrate 11g (4%), Dietary Fiber 1g (4%), Total Sugars 7g (includes added sugars). Protein 3g. Vitamin D 0mcg, Calcium 7mg, Iron 1mg, Potassium 120mg.

Soft, fresh, and a Jamaican staple.That classic hardough—light, fluffy, and always ready. Whether it’s toast in the morning or something quick with ackee and saltfish, it just works

products.name: Ackee in Brine
products.description:
A Jamaican essential.Ready when you are. Once it hits the pan with saltfish, onions, and peppers, it’s already on its way.

Ingredients: Ackee, Water, Salt.

Nutrition Facts: About 6 Serving Per Container. Serving size 1/4 cup (53g/1.9oz). Calories 80. Total Fat 7g (8%), Saturated Fat 2.5g (12%), Trans Fat 0g. Sodium 200mg (6%). Total Carbohydrate 0g (0%). Protein 2g. Potassium 100mg (2%), Vitamin C 25%.

products.name: Bulla 4-Pack
products.description:
Firm, spiced, and straight from yaad.Simple, filling, and full of flavor. The kind of thing that’s always around when you need a quick bite.

Product Details: 4-pack assortment.

products.name: Bammy Sticks
products.description:
Authentic and versatile.Made from cassava the traditional way. Once there’s escovitch or fried fish on the plate, it finds its place right beside it.

Product Details: Net weight 14 oz (397g). Pack size 10 x 397g x 24. Authentic Jamaican. Best quality guaranteed.

products.name: Mini Bammy
products.description:
Same tradition, smaller size.Easy to serve, easy to enjoy—same authentic taste in a more convenient form.

Product Details: Net weight 14 oz (397g). Authentic Jamaican. Best quality guaranteed.

products.name: Curry Powder Spicy
products.description:
Bold, rich, and full of depth.Built for real flavor—the kind that carries through the whole dish.

Ingredients: Turmeric, coriander, paprika, annatto, mustard, spices.

Directions for use: Use approximately 1 oz curry powder per 1 lb of meat, fish, or vegetables. In a saucepan, heat 1 tablespoon of oil, add curry powder, and cook briefly. Add seasoned meat or fish and cook over heat, adding a little water or wine to make a tasty gravy. Serve with plain boiled rice and tossed salad. Can be accompanied by chutney, mango, or pineapple.

Nutrition Facts: Serving size 1 oz. About 80 servings per container. Calories 13. Total fat 4.9 g (7.5%), trans fat 0 g, saturated fat 0 g, cholesterol 0 mg, sodium 0 mg, total carbohydrate 17.5 g (5.8%), dietary fiber 3.3 g, sugars 0 g, protein 3.4 g. Vitamin A 0%, vitamin C 0%, calcium 30%, iron 15%.

Product Details: Net weight 80 oz (5 lbs). Authentic Jamaican. Product of Jamaica.

products.name: Mild Jerk Seasoning
products.description:
Flavorful without too much heat.All the taste of jerk, just dialed back a bit so you can use it anytime.

Suggested use: For each pound of meat, fish, or poultry, use 2-3 teaspoons of seasoning. Rub in and leave to marinate for about two hours, then grill, roast, fry, or use for stew. Can also be used on vegetables with scrambled eggs and soups.

Storage: Do not use if the band around the cap is missing or broken. Store in a cool, dry place. Refrigerate after opening.

Ingredients: Scallion, hot pepper, salt, spices, acetic acid, thyme, 0.033% potassium sorbate as preservative.

Nutrition Facts: Serving size 1 oz (28 g). About 136 servings per container. Calories 5. Total fat 0 g, saturated fat 0 g, trans fat 0 g, cholesterol 0 mg, sodium 550 mg (22%), total carbohydrate 0 g, dietary fiber 0 g, sugars 0 g, protein 0 g. Vitamin A 0%, vitamin C 0%, calcium 2%, iron 10%.

Product Details: Net weight 136 oz (8.5 lbs) / 3.85 kg. Authentic Jamaican. Product of Jamaica.

Real spice. Real heat.This one doesn’t play—proper heat with that deep, smoky flavor.

Suggested use: For each pound of meat, fish, or poultry, use 2-3 teaspoons of seasoning. Rub in and leave to marinate for about two hours, then grill, roast, fry, or use for stew. Can also be used on vegetables with scrambled eggs and soups.

Storage: Do not use if the band around the cap is missing or broken. Store in a cool, dry place. Refrigerate after opening.

Ingredients: Scallion, hot pepper, salt, spices, acetic acid, thyme, 0.033% potassium sorbate as preservative.

Nutrition Facts: Serving size 1 oz (28 g). About 136 servings per container. Calories 5. Total fat 0 g, saturated fat 0 g, trans fat 0 g, cholesterol 0 mg, sodium 550 mg (22%), total carbohydrate 0 g, dietary fiber 0 g, sugars 0 g, protein 0 g. Vitamin A 0%, vitamin C 0%, calcium 2%, iron 10%.

Product Details: Net weight 136 oz (8.5 lbs) / 3.85 kg. Authentic Jamaican. Product of Jamaica.
